snippet.title: Zoetis CEO Kristin Peck on Q2 earnings results, state of animal health care
snippet.description:
Kristin Peck, Zoetis CEO, joins 'Squawk on the Street' to discuss what the company's guidance was largely driven by, the most important aspect of Zoetis' business, and how new GLP-1 drugs could play into Zoetis' business.
